item.description:
The Football Pod @Football_Pod_ · 10min This is great stuff Cita Off The Ball @offtheball · 1h "It's a different approach to the game, he's gonna have to get used to it"
Oisin Conaty has a target on him for defenders. How can players adapt to being tagged?
@Football_Pod_
- https:// youtu.be/v52J9zP5YBQ 143

item.title: StatsAndSolos: Stats and Solos @StatsAndSolos · 42min Armagh move from 19% -> 26% as Tyrone drop out Cita Stats and Solos @StatsAndSolo

item.title: GAAPlusOfficial: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 42min Did Tyrone miss a trick with their kick-out strategy when Armagh went down to 14 men? 875
